meta.title: Jonathan Brownstein — AI/ML Data Contributor
meta.description: Chicago area professional with more than ten years supporting machine learning and analytics programs through data quality review, labeling standards, content evaluation, and governed testing in regulated enterprise envi

hero.description: Chicago area professional with more than ten years supporting machine learning and analytics programs through data quality review, labeling standards, content evaluation, and governed testing in regulated enterprise environments. I follow written project guidelines closely, document results clearly, and finish task based assignments on schedule. Comfortable with remote work, on site sessions when required, and flexible part time contract schedules. MS in Economics with applied econometrics training. Based in Wauconda, Illinois within the Chicago metro area.

highlights.label: AI/ML data contributor, data labeling, data annotation, content evaluation, machine learning data quality, QA and testing, attention to detail, task based delivery, model validation support, anomaly review, metadata and lineage checks, Python and SQL for data review, Excel for structured QA, remote and on site participation, part time contract availability, Chicago Illinois

items.title: Machine Learning Data Quality and Validation Specialist
items.organization: Global life and health reinsurance, remote contract
bullets: Reviewed and validated training data for classification machine learning workflows, applying consistent labeling rules and escalation criteria before models moved to production.

Performed content evaluation and quality checks on large structured datasets used in actuarial and finance reporting, catching attribute drift and inconsistencies before downstream consumers relied on the numbers.
Supported user acceptance style testing on analytics releases, logging defects, confirming fixes, and signing off when results matched project guidelines.
Partnered with data engineering and governance teams on metadata standards that made labeled fields easier to audit and reuse across projects.

items.title: Analytics QA and Reporting Validation Lead
bullets: Led quality review on cross functional reporting outputs used by finance, sales, and operations leadership, with checklist driven validation before numbers went to executives.
Built automated checks that flagged missing fields, out of range values, and broken joins in recurring KPI datasets.
Coordinated testing cycles with business sponsors, tracked issues to resolution, and documented handoffs so internal teams could maintain the reports.

groups.title: AI/ML support
